headline: 3 Profitable Stocks We Find Risky
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

headline: Is Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) Fairly Priced After Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Performance
summary: If you are wondering whether Live Nation Entertainment's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this article is designed to walk you through the key numbers in a straightforward way. The stock last closed at US$165.83, with returns of 4.5% over the past week, 12.1% over the past month, 14.1% year to date, 34.9% over the past year, 147.4% over three years and 91.3% over five years. Recent market interest has been shaped by ongoing attention on the live events and ticketing...

headline: 3 Reasons LYV is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead

headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy on Live Nation Entertainment, Raises Price Target to $190
